basic_details.job_title: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra PGT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website https://sonbhadra.nic.in. A total of 1 PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) vacancy has been announced through the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT)/MCA with minimum 50% marks, M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with minimum 50% marks, B.Ed. with minimum 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution, Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. with minimum 50% marks, Four years Integrated Degree including B.Ed. component with minimum 50% marks
qualification.details: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks AND B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. OR Four years Integrated Degree including B.Ed. component with at least 50% marks.

selection_process: Merit based on Educational Qualifications Weightage Personal Interaction/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sonbhadra.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. OR Four years Integrated Degree including B.Ed. component with at least 50% marks.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://sonbhadra.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) position is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) or MCA with at least 50% marks, or an M.E./M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks, along with a B.Ed. degree from an NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks, or an integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. or a four-year integrated degree including a B.Ed. component.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 50 years as of 1st July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 36,000 per month for the Guest Faculty position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit determined by educational qualifications, followed by a personal interaction/interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Sonbhadra, which is https://sonbhadra.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The PGT Computer Science (Guest Faculty) position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the Advertisement Number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Advertisement Number for this recruitment is 1/622188/2026.
